name: WF-600 Analytics Evolution Pack Canonical

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$json, dossier_context: { dossier_id: $json.dossier_id || 'DOSSIER-UNSPECIFIED', pack: 'WF-600', loaded_at: new Date().toISOString(), route: $json.route_id || 'ROUTE_PHASE1_ANALYTICS', publish_ready: !!$json.publish_ready_packet } } }];

return [{ json: { ...$json, pack_context: { child_workflows: ['CWF-610-performance-metrics-collector', 'CWF-620-audience-feedback-aggregator', 'CWF-630-evolution-signal-synthesizer'], primary_director: 'Chandra', strategic_authority: 'Chandra', governance_authority: ['Chitragupta', 'Yama'] } } }];
